term: Be Way Out of Your League
englishDefinitions: To be much better-looking, more talented, or more successful than you, especially in a romantic context.
To seem far beyond what you could realistically attract, compete with, or deserve.
persianTranslation: خیلی بالاتر از سطح تو بودن
خیلی از دسترس تو خارج بودن
examples: He thought she was way out of his league.
Don't say that—you're not out of anyone's league.
Many people feel nervous dating someone who seems way out of their league.
